title: nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-Nano-9B-v2
summary: New Nemotron Nano variant published under the NVIDIA organization on Hugging Face with updated model-card benchmarks; a new size class changes what fits on smaller deployment targets.

title: CUDA Toolkit 13.0 Release Notes
summary: Release notes index now lists a CUDA Toolkit 13.0 entry covering compiler updates and deprecated-architecture removals; a major-version bump changes build requirements and driver compatibility.
